versions.version_description: This version is a little more accurate and included the orchestra intro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When You Say Nothing At All
Two Less Lonely People In The World

content:
She's Out Of My Life by Michael Jackson 

[tab][Intro:] E-F#m x2
E |---0---0---0------4h5---|
B |-0---4---0--------------|
G |-------------2----------|
D |------------------------|
A |------------------------|
E |------------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#dim[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A#dim[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I don't know whether to laugh or cry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
I don't know whether to live or die[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]

[tab][Intro:] E-F#m
E |---0---0---0------4h5---|
B |-0---4---0--------------|
G |-------------2----------|
D |------------------------|
A |------------------------|
E |------------------------|[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#dim[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A#dim[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
It's out of my hands[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
To think for two years she was here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]G#[/ch]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I took her for granted I was so cavalier![/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
Now the way that it stands [/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my hands[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
So I've learned that love's not possession[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
And I've learned that love won't wait[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Now I've learned that love needs expression[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
But I learned too late[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#dim[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A#dim[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
She's out of my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
Damned indecision and cursed pride[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]G#[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]
Kept my love for her locked deep inside![/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
She's out of my...life[/tab]

[tab][Outro:] E-F#m (End on E)
E |---0---0---0----|
B |-0---4---0------|
G |-------------2--|
D |----------------|
A |----------------|
E |----------------|[/tab]
